what_was_done: Built /experiment skill (autoresearch-style loop). Created SKILL.md + program.md template. Tested in 3 worktree runs, applied 4 bug fixes. 9-model fan-out research on Karpathy's autoresearch. Voice STT+TTS confirmed working.
known_issues: Gate 19 cascade on branch switch (low priority — anti-cascade limit handles it)
